dish_name: Roasted Cauliflower Steaks with Romesco Sauce
description: Roasted Cauliflower Steaks with Romesco Sauce over a bed of simply seasoned lentils. A quick and easy sheet pan dinner – vegan, plant-powered, and full of flavor!
ingredients: [{"name": "dry lentils", "units": "cup", "amount": 1}, {"name": "water", "units": "cups", "amount": 6}, {"name": "salt", "units": "teaspoon", "amount": 1}, {"name": "extra-large cauliflower", "units": "unit", "amount": 1}, {"name": "large bell pepper", "units": "unit", "amount": 1}, {"name": "red onion", "units": "unit", "amount": 0.5}, {"name": "fat garlic cloves", "units": "cloves", "amount": 4}, {"name": "olive oil", "units": "tablespoons", "amount": 3}, {"name": "smoked paprika", "units": "teaspoon", "amount": 1}, {"name": "cumin", "units": "teaspoon", "amount": 1}, {"name": "coriander", "units": "teaspoon", "amount": 1}, {"name": "salt", "units": "teaspoon", "amount": 0.75}, {"name": "almonds", "units": "cup", "amount": 0.5}, {"name": "smoked paprika", "units": "teaspoons", "amount": 2}, {"name": "cumin", "units": "teaspoon", "amount": 1}, {"name": "salt", "units": "teaspoon", "amount": 0.5}, {"name": "black pepper", "units": "teaspoon", "amount": 0.5}, {"name": "cayenne", "units": "teaspoon", "amount": 0.25}, {"name": "tomato paste", "units": "tablespoon", "amount": 1}, {"name": "red wine vinegar", "units": "tablespoon", "amount": 1}, {"name": "olive oil", "units": "cup", "amount": 0.25}, {"name": "water", "units": "tablespoons", "amount": 2}]
instructions: 1. Preheat the oven and start the lentils cooking on the stovetop. 2. Slice the Cauliflower into ½-¾ inch slices, then trim the leaves, leaving the stem intact. Place on a parchment paper-lined baking sheet that has been sprayed with spray olive oil. 3. Make the quick marinade and brush it over the cauliflower and bell pepper, onion and garlic. 4. Roast until the stems of the cauliflower are fork-tender. 5. When the peppers are collapsing, make the romesco sauce. Place the pepper, onion, garlic, almonds, spices, olive oil, vinegar, tomato paste and salt in the food processor and pulse. 6. Season the lentils with a little olive oil, and salt and pepper to taste. 7. Assemble! Divide lentils among bowls, divide romesco sauce, then top with the roasted cauliflower. Sprinkle with some fresh herbs and you are good to go.
notes: Leftovers will keep up to 4 days in a sealed container in the refrigerator. The sauce and lentils can be frozen.
tags: vegan, gluten-free, sheet pan dinner, healthy
